criteria_verification.evidence: TestQueuedForDispatchMarkerOnVoiceReactiveSession has six tests covering: (a) emit_voice_ack_and_queue('reachy', SwapStatus(eta=240)) returns VoiceAckOutcome(emitted=True, queued=True); (b) outcome is a VoiceAckOutcome instance; (c) outcome.ack_text equals VOICE_ACK_TTS_TEXT and is non-empty; (d) emit_ack=False path returns queued=False, ack_text=None; (e) cli adapter at ETA=240 returns queued=False; (f) input SwapStatus is not mutated. TestNoAudioOrNetworkIoFromVoiceAckPolicy adds three further hygiene tests asserting the helper returns only a bool / dataclass (no audio sink touched, no network call) and that overrides do not mutate the module-level default set. The TTS hook is implicitly stubbed because Phase 2 emit_voice_ack_and_queue only returns the outcome — it does not synthesize audio.
